vulnerability.title: The s-nail Package Is Installed
vulnerability.description: A mail server is required for sending emails. The s-nail package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install s-nail
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "s-nail" ; then dnf install -y "s-nail" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi
